violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Close boxes/bags of food items in walk in cooler.

Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Food on display for self service was not properly protected by food guards, display cases, or similarly effective means. Unwrapped cookies at customer service counter display not provided with adequate sneeze protection.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a self closing door. Men's & women's restroom doors not provided with self closing devices.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Multiple floors tiles missing or damaged.
Backflow prevention, back siphonage (3 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Backflow prevention, back siphonage (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
